businessSummary.oneLiner: World's largest EV maker and 'Physical AI Platform' company spanning autonomous driving, robotics, and energy storage
businessSummary.description: Tesla is transitioning from EV manufacturing to an integrated AI, robotics, and energy platform. FY2025 revenue $94.8B (-2.9% YoY), net income $3.8B (-46.5% YoY). Thursday close $395.01 (-3.14%). Shares tumbled alongside the broader market (S&P -1.52%, Nasdaq -1.78%) as surging oil prices and escalating Iran tensions hammered growth stocks. Previous day's BofA Buy upgrade ($460 PT) and Macrohard (xAI joint venture) announcement failed to hold gains. Market cap $1.27T, P/E ~366x, Forward P/E ~191x.
howTheyMakeMoney: Vehicle sales: ~73% of revenue ($69.5B). Model 3/Y core, Model S/X discontinuing Q2 2026
Energy business: ~14% of revenue ($12.8B, +27% YoY). Megapack/Powerwall growth
Services/Other: ~10% of revenue. Supercharger network, insurance, parts
FSD/Software: ~$3B in license revenue. Subscription conversion accelerating

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on EPS $1.08. Extreme premium reflecting autonomous driving/robotics optionality

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2026E EPS $2.07. Includes recovery expectations

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Sharp decline from price war + increased R&D spending

keyMetrics.name: ROE
keyMetrics.interpretation: Reflects FY2025 profitability decline. FY2026E improvement expected

growthDrivers.title: BofA Buy Upgrade — $460 Price Target, AI/Robotics Pipeline Undervalued
growthDrivers.description: Bank of America resumed coverage on 3/4 with Hold→Buy upgrade and $460 target. Cited Tesla's AI and robotics pipeline as undervalued optionality amid DOGE noise.

growthDrivers.title: Macrohard (Digital Optimus) — Joint xAI Project for Software Disruption
growthDrivers.description: On 3/11, Musk unveiled Tesla-xAI joint project 'Macrohard' (Digital Optimus). Pairs Grok LLM with a Tesla-built AI agent to automate office work by watching screens and imitating human actions.

growthDrivers.title: Forbes: 'Tesla's Best Growth Story Isn't Robotaxis — It's Batteries'
growthDrivers.description: Forbes analysis on 3/12: Energy business ($12.8B, +27% YoY) via Megapack/Powerwall is the real growth engine with higher margins than the vehicle segment.

growthDrivers.title: GTC 2026 (3/16-19) — Autonomous Driving Catalyst D-4
growthDrivers.description: NVIDIA's next-gen Rubin architecture reveal at GTC could spotlight AI chips for Tesla FSD, potentially reigniting the entire autonomous driving sector.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: US EV market leader with 50%+ share, though globally surpassed by BYD. Vertical integration across software, manufacturing, energy, and 8.2B FSD miles is the core moat.

moats.description: 8.2 billion FSD miles. Overwhelmingly more training data than competitors.
In-house battery (4680), custom chips (HW4), software (FSD), charging infrastructure (Supercharger).
NACS as North American EV charging standard. GM, Ford, Rivian depend on Tesla Superchargers.

competitors.name: BYD
competitors.detail: 2025 global EV sales 2.26M units (+28%). Surpassed Tesla's 1.64M (-9%)

competitors.name: Lucid (LCID)
competitors.detail: Q4 revenue $523M (+123%). Targeting premium EV market

competitors.name: Rivian (RIVN)
competitors.detail: R2 launch for mass market. BofA Underperform $14 rating

competitors.name: Waymo (Alphabet)
competitors.detail: Expanding robotaxi service. Leading L4 autonomous driving

recentNews.headline: TSLA -3.14% — Market-wide selloff on surging oil and Iran tensions
recentNews.significance: S&P 500 -1.52%, Dow -700 points. Iran conflict escalation drove oil prices above $100, pressuring growth stocks across the board.

recentNews.headline: Forbes: 'Tesla's Best Growth Story Isn't Robotaxis — It's Batteries'
recentNews.significance: Energy business at $12.8B (+27% YoY) identified as the real growth engine, with higher margins than the vehicle segment.

recentNews.headline: Musk unveils Macrohard (Digital Optimus) — Joint Tesla-xAI AI agent project
recentNews.significance: Grok LLM + Tesla AI agent to automate office work. Software market disruption ambition. Drove +2.15% gain on the day.

recentNews.headline: BofA resumes TSLA with Buy upgrade and $460 price target
recentNews.significance: Hold→Buy change. AI and robotics pipeline cited as undervalued optionality. +16% upside from current price.

recentNews.headline: TSLA +2.15% to $407.82 — Double catalyst rally
recentNews.significance: BofA upgrade + Macrohard announcement drove gains, but all gains erased the following day.

analystOpinions.notableComment: BofA Buy upgrade ($460 PT) newly added. Hold consensus maintained among 31 analysts with average target $406.84. Extremely polarized: high $600 (robotaxi success) vs low $125 (fundamentals-based).

risks.title: Oil Surge + Iran Conflict — Macro Headwinds Intensifying
risks.description: Iran tensions pushing oil above $100. Growth stock selloff pressure. Long-term EV tailwind but near-term sentiment deterioration.

risks.title: Global Deliveries Declining — Surpassed by BYD
risks.description: 2025 deliveries 1.63M (-8.6% YoY). BYD sold 2.26M (+28%), taking global EV crown.

risks.title: P/E ~366x — Extreme Valuation
risks.description: Revenue declining and margins compressing yet P/E ~366x. Autonomous driving and robotics success largely priced in.

risks.title: xAI-Tesla Conflict of Interest Risk
risks.description: Macrohard project could complicate existing shareholder lawsuits over xAI conflicts of interest. Corporate governance concerns.

risks.title: -53% From December Highs — Technical Weakness Persists
risks.description: Trading below both 50-day ($399) and 200-day ($418) SMAs. Technical bearish phase.

buyReasons.title: BofA Buy Upgrade $460 — AI/Robotics Undervalued
buyReasons.rationale: Provides institutional cover to re-enter. AI and robotics pipeline deemed undervalued amid DOGE noise.

buyReasons.title: Macrohard — $5T+ Software TAM Entry
buyReasons.rationale: xAI Grok + Tesla AI agent for office automation. Pivot from hardware to software platform begins.

buyReasons.title: Energy Business +27% YoY — Hidden Growth Engine
buyReasons.rationale: Megapack/Powerwall at $12.8B revenue (+27% YoY). Forbes calls it the 'best growth story.'

buyReasons.title: Net Cash $29.3B + FCF $6.22B — Financial Fortress
buyReasons.rationale: Near-zero leverage with ample R&D investment capacity.

overallOpinion: Tesla closed Thursday at $395.01 (-3.14%), swept up in a broad market selloff as surging oil prices and escalating Iran tensions hammered equities (S&P -1.52%, Nasdaq -1.78%).

The previous day's BofA Buy upgrade ($460 PT) and Macrohard (xAI joint venture) announcement drove a +2.15% rally, only for gains to be completely erased. The stock now trades below both 50-day ($399) and 200-day ($418) SMAs, signaling technical weakness.

The key catalyst ahead is GTC 2026 (3/16). NVIDIA's Rubin reveal could reignite the autonomous driving narrative. Paradoxically, surging oil prices could accelerate long-term EV adoption, but short-term growth stock valuation pressure dominates.

telegram.hook: 🔴 TSLA $395.01 (-3.14%) — Oil spike drags market, erases BofA rally
telegram.text:
Iran escalation pushed oil past $100. S&P -1.52%, Nasdaq -1.78%. Yesterday's BofA Buy upgrade ($460 PT) and Macrohard (xAI AI agent collab) drove +2.15% — all erased in one session.

Forbes: 'Best growth story isn't robotaxis — it's batteries.' Energy revenue $12.8B (+27% YoY).

Now below both 50-day and 200-day SMAs. Technically weak, but GTC 2026 (3/16) Rubin reveal could reignite autonomous driving plays.

Full analysis 👉 investory.kro.kr/stock/TSLA/analysis/2026-03-13
